text: devar-yehva asher haya el-yovel ben-petuel
shime'u-zot hazeqenim vehaazinu kol yovshevey haarets hehayeta zot bimeykhem veim bimey avoteykhem
'aleyha liveneykhem saperu uveneykhem liveneyhem uveneyhem ledovr acher
yeter hagazam akhal haarebe veyeter haarebe akhal hayaleq veyeter hayeleq akhal hechasil
haqitsu shikovrim uvekhu veheylilu kal-shotey yayin 'al-'asis ki nikherat mipikhem
ki-govy 'ala 'al-aretsi 'atsum veeyn misepar shinayv shiney areye umetale'ovt lavi lov
sam gafeni leshama uteenati liqetsafa chasof chasafah vehishelikh hilebinu sarigeyha
eli kivetula chagurat-saq 'al-ba'al ne'ureyha
hakherat minecha vanesekh mibeyt yehva avelu hakohanim mesharetey yehva
shudad sade avela adama ki shudad dagan hovvish tirovsh umelal yitsehar
hovishu ikarim heylilu koremim 'al-chita ve'al-se'ora ki avad qetsir sade
hagefen hovvisha vehateena umelala rimovn gam-tamar vetapucha kal-'atsey hasade yaveshu ki-hovish sasovn min-beney adam s
chigeru vesifedu hakohanim heylilu mesharetey mizebecha bou linu vasaqim mesharetey elohay ki nimena' mibeyt eloheykhem minecha vanasekh
qadeshu-tsovm qireu 'atsara isefu zeqenim kol yoshevey haarets beyt yehva eloheykhem veza'aqu el-yehva
ahah layovm ki qarovv yovm yehva ukheshod mishaday yavov
halov neged 'eyneynu okhel nikherat mibeyt eloheynu simecha vagil
'aveshu ferudovt tachat megerefoteyhem nashamu otsarovt neheresu mamegurovt ki hovish dagan
mah-neenecha vehema navokhu 'ederey vaqar ki eyn mire'e lahem gam-'ederey hatson neeshamu
eleykha yehva eqera ki esh akhela neovt midebar velehava lihata kal-'atsey hasade
gam-bahamovt sade ta'arovg eleykha ki yaveshu afiqey mayim veesh akhela neovt hamidebar f
tiqe'u shovfar betsiyovn vehari'u behar qadeshi yiregezu kol yoshevey haarets ki-va yovm-yehva ki qarovv
yovm choshekh vaafela yovm 'anan va'arafel keshachar parus 'al-heharim 'am rav ve'atsum kamohu lo niheya min-ha'ovlam veacharayv lo yovsef 'ad-sheney dovr vadovr
lefanayv akhela esh veacharayv telahet lehava kegan-'eden haarets lefanayv veacharayv midebar shemama vegam-peleyta lo-hayeta lov
kemaree susim mareehu ukhefarashim ken yerutsun
keqovl marekavovt 'al-rashey heharim yeraqedun keqovl lahav esh okhela qash ke'am 'atsum 'erukh milechama
mipanayv yachilu 'amim kal-panim qibetsu farur
kegibovrim yerutsun keaneshey milechama ya'alu chovma veish biderakhayv yelekhun velo ye'abetun orechovtam
veish achiv lo yidechaqun gever bimesilatov yelekhun uve'ad hashelach yipolu lo yivetsa'u
ba'ir yashoqu bachovma yerutsun babatim ya'alu be'ad hachalovnim yavou kaganav
lefanayv rageza erets ra'ashu shamayim shemesh veyarecha qadaru vekhovkhavim asefu nageham
vayhva natan qovlov lifeney cheylov ki rav meod machanehu ki 'atsum 'ose devarov ki-gadovl yovm-yehva venovra meod umi yekhilenu
vegam-'ata neum-yehva shuvu 'aday bekhal-levavekhem uvetsovm uvevekhi uvemiseped
veqire'u levavekhem veal-bigedeykhem veshuvu el-yehva eloheykhem ki-chanun verachum hu erekh apayim verav-chesed venicham 'al-hara'a
mi yovde'a yashuv venicham vehisheir acharayv berakha minecha vanesekh layhva eloheykhem f
tiqe'u shovfar betsiyovn qadeshu-tsovm qireu 'atsara
isefu-'am qadeshu qahal qivetsu zeqenim isefu 'ovlalim veyoneqey shadayim yetse chatan mechederov vekhala mechupatah
beyn haulam velamizebecha yiveku hakohanim mesharetey yehva veyomeru chusa yehva 'al-'amekha veal-titen nachalatekha lecherepa limeshal-bam govyim lama yomeru va'amim aye eloheyhem
vayeqane yehva learetsov vayachemol 'al-'amov
vaya'an yehva vayomer le'amov hineni sholecha lakhem et-hadagan vehatirovsh vehayitsehar useva'etem otov velo-eten etekhem 'ovd cherepa bagovyim
veet-hatsefovni arechiq me'aleykhem vehidachetiv el-erets tsiya ushemama et-panayv el-hayam haqademoni vesofov el-hayam haacharovn ve'ala vaeshov veta'al tsachanatov ki higedil la'asovt
al-tirei adama gili usemachi ki-higedil yehva la'asovt
al-tireu bahamovt saday ki dasheu neovt midebar ki-'ets nasa fireyov teena vagefen natenu cheylam
uveney tsiyovn gilu vesimechu bayhva eloheykhem ki-natan lakhem et-hamovre litsedaqa vayovred lakhem geshem movre umaleqovsh barishovn
umaleu hagoranovt bar veheshiqu hayeqavim tirovsh veyitsehar
veshilameti lakhem et-hashanim asher akhal haarebe hayeleq vehechasil vehagazam cheyli hagadovl asher shilacheti bakhem
vaakhaletem akhovl vesavov'a vehilaletem et-shem yehva eloheykhem asher-'asa 'imakhem lehafeli velo-yevoshu 'ami le'ovlam
vida'etem ki veqerev yiserael ani vaani yehva eloheykhem veeyn 'ovd velo-yevoshu 'ami le'ovlam s
vehaya acharey-khen eshepovkh et-ruchi 'al-kal-basar venibeu beneykhem uvenovteykhem ziqeneykhem chalomovt yachalomun bachureykhem chezeyonovt yireu
vegam 'al-ha'avadim ve'al-hashefachovt bayamim hahema eshepovkh et-ruchi
venatati movfetim bashamayim uvaarets dam vaesh vetimarovt 'ashan
hashemesh yehafekh lechoshekh vehayarecha ledam lifeney bov yovm yehva hagadovl vehanovra
vehaya kol asher-yiqera beshem yehva yimalet ki behar-tsiyovn uvirushalaim tiheye feleyta kaasher amar yehva uvaseridim asher yehva qore
ki hine bayamim hahema uva'et hahi asher ashuv kh ashiv q et-shevut yehuda virushalaim
veqibatseti et-kal-hagovyim vehovradetim el-'emeq yehovshafat venishepateti 'imam sham 'al-'ami venachalati yiserael asher pizeru vagovyim veet-aretsi chilequ
veel-'ami yadu govral vayitenu hayeled bazovna vehayaleda makheru vayayin vayishetu
vegam mah-atem li tsor vetsidovn vekhol gelilovt pelashet hagemul atem meshalemim 'alay veim-gomelim atem 'alay qal mehera ashiv gemulekhem beroshekhem
asher-kasepi uzehavi leqachetem umachamaday hatovim havetem leheykheleykhem
uveney yehuda uveney yerushalaim mekharetem liveney hayevanim lema'an harechiqam me'al gevulam
hineni me'iram min-hamaqovm asher-mekharetem otam shama vahashivoti gemulekhem beroshekhem
umakhareti et-beneykhem veet-benovteykhem beyad beney yehuda umekharum lishevayim el-govy rachovq ki yehva diber s
qireu-zot bagovyim qadeshu milechama ha'iru hagibovrim yigeshu ya'alu kol aneshey hamilechama
kotu iteykhem lacharavovt umazemeroteykhem liremachim hachalash yomar gibovr ani
'ushu vavou khal-hagovyim misaviv veniqebatsu shama hanechat yehva gibovreykha
ye'ovru veya'alu hagovyim el-'emeq yehovshafat ki sham eshev lishepot et-kal-hagovyim misaviv
shilechu magal ki vashal qatsir bou redu ki-malea gat heshiqu hayeqavim ki raba ra'atam
hamovnim hamovnim be'emeq hecharuts ki qarovv yovm yehva be'emeq hecharuts
shemesh veyarecha qadaru vekhovkhavim asefu nageham
vayhva mitsiyovn yisheag umirushalaim yiten qovlov vera'ashu shamayim vaarets vayhva machase le'amov uma'ovz liveney yiserael
vida'etem ki ani yehva eloheykhem shokhen betsiyovn har-qadeshi vehayeta yerushalaim qodesh vezarim lo-ya'averu-vah 'ovd s
vehaya vayovm hahu yitefu heharim 'asis vehageva'ovt telakhena chalav vekhal-afiqey yehuda yelekhu mayim uma'eyan mibeyt yehva yetse vehisheqa et-nachal hashitim
mitserayim lishemama tiheye veedovm lemidebar shemama tiheye mechamas beney yehuda asher-shafekhu dam-naqi bearetsam
vihuda le'ovlam teshev virushalaim ledovr vadovr
veniqeyti damam lo-niqeyti vayhva shokhen betsiyovn
